destinations.evidence: get_fulfilled_original_transactions converts each fulfilled entry by passing metadata.original_tx into convert_original_to_signed, and that conversion match includes OriginalTransaction::Passkey(signed_tx) => signed_tx.clone().into() alongside Legacy, Eip1559, Scheduled, and AsyncSettlement.

equivalence_argument: This is an exact in-port mapping for the fulfilled-original conversion boundary: passkey originals flow through the same conversion path as the other original transaction variants and produce a TransactionSigned before being wrapped back into a pool transaction.

related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-alloy-internal/crates/consensus/src/transaction/async_commitment.rs decodes passkey originals, but the required fulfilled-original conversion is implemented in the port pool code.

notes: Mapped directly in the port evidence file; Alloy only supplies related passkey original decoding.
rationale: The primary candidate directly identifies the conversion match arm that clones OriginalTransaction::Passkey into TransactionSigned alongside the already-supported Legacy, EIP-1559, and Scheduled originals. None of the bounded scheduler neighbors supersede or obsolete this passkey-specific async-pool requirement.
statement: At current tip, a fulfilled async pool entry whose original transaction is OriginalTransaction::Passkey must convert back into the corresponding TransactionSigned when fulfilled originals are returned, just as Legacy, EIP-1559, and Scheduled originals do.
suggested_falsification_tests: Insert a fulfilled async pool entry whose original_tx is Passkey and assert get_fulfilled_original_transactions converts and returns the corresponding TransactionSigned instead of failing conversion.
Populate fulfilled async pool entries for Passkey and Scheduled originals together and assert both variants are returned as TransactionSigned without dropping or misclassifying the passkey original.
summary: Fulfilled passkey async originals convert back to TransactionSigned in the port async pool.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Insert a fulfilled async pool entry whose original_tx is OriginalTransaction::Passkey and assert get_fulfilled_original_transactions returns a TransactionSigned-backed pool transaction rather than dropping it or failing conversion.
title: Passkey async originals convert back to signed transactions
